ddls:
CREATE TABLE "speed_records" (
  "speed_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speed record */,
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speed ID of the road segment */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the speed record */,
  "avg_speed" REAL /* Average speed recorded */,
  "week_day" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "ref_speed_id_day_week" INTEGER /* Reference to the average speed for the same day of the week */,
  "ref_speed_id_day_week_hour_day" INTEGER /* Reference to the average speed for the same day of the week and hour of the day */,
  "dif_speed_id_day_week" REAL /* Difference between the current speed and the average speed for the same day of the week */,
  "dif_speed_id_day_week_hour_day" REAL /* Difference between the current speed and the average speed for the same day of the week and hour of the day */,
  "speed_variance" REAL /* Variance in speed compared to historical data */,
  "traffic_congestion_level" TEXT /* Level of traffic congestion (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speed_records_ref_speed_id_day_week FOREIGN KEY ("ref_speed_id_day_week") REFERENCES speed_references_day_week ("ref_speed_id_day_week"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speed_records_speed_id FOREIGN KEY ("speed_id") REFERENCES speed_ids ("speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speed_records_ref_speed_id_day_week_hour_day FOREIGN KEY ("ref_speed_id_day_week_hour_day") REFERENCES speed_references_day_week_hour_day ("ref_speed_id_day_week_hour_day")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_segments" (
  "road_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road segment */,
  "road_name" TEXT /* Name of the road */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Start point of the road segment */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* End point of the road segment */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the road segment in kilometers */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of traffic flow */,
  "lane_count" INTEGER /* Number of lanes */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of road (e.g., highway, arterial, collector) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speed_ids" (
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speed ID */,
  "road_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road segment */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speed_ids_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speed_ids_road_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_segment_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("road_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., radar, camera) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speed_references_day_week" (
  "ref_speed_id_day_week" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference speed (day of week) */,
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speed ID */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "avg_speed" REAL /* Average speed for the day of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ref_speed_id_day_week")
)

CREATE TABLE "speed_references_day_week_hour_day" (
  "ref_speed_id_day_week_hour_day" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference speed (day of week and hour of day) */,
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speed ID */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day */,
  "avg_speed" REAL /* Average speed for the day of the week and hour of the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ref_speed_id_day_week_hour_day")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic incident */,
  "road_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road segment */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., accident, road closure) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the incident */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_incidents_road_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_segment_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("road_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition record */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., North, South) */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_flow" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic flow record */,
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speed ID */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the flow record */,
  "vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Traffic volume (e.g., vehicles per hour) */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Occupancy rate of the road segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_flow_speed_id FOREIGN KEY ("speed_id") REFERENCES speed_ids ("speed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "speed_record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speed record ID */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident ID */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather ID */,
  "send_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., traffic alert, weather alert) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, ignored) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES traffic_incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_speed_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("speed_record_id") REFERENCES speed_records ("speed_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., resident, visitor, official) */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., traffic alert, weather alert) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "preferred_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "custom_message" TEXT /* Custom message for notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor ID */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person performing the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES maintainers ("maintainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road condition record */,
  "road_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road segment ID */,
  "condition_date" TEXT /* Date of the condition record */,
  "surface_quality" TEXT /* Surface quality of the road segment (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the road segment (e.g., up-to-date, overdue) */,
  "repair_priority" TEXT /* Priority for repairs (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_conditions_road_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_segment_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("road_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic pattern */,
  "road_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road segment ID */,
  "date_range_start" TEXT /* Start date of the pattern */,
  "date_range_end" TEXT /* End date of the pattern */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of pattern (e.g., rush hour, weekend) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pattern */,
  "traffic_volume_trend" TEXT /* Trend in traffic volume (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_patterns_road_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_segment_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("road_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintainers" (
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintainer */,
  "maintainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the maintainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the maintainer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the maintainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintainer_id")
)
